_meta.description: Curated real-world analog trends for Women's Co-ord Sets in the Indian value-fashion market. Hand-curated and disclosed as such. Outcomes are directional estimates based on publicly available retail reporting and market research.
_meta.source_note: Directional outcomes sourced from Myntra trend reports, industry press (Apparel Resources, Retail Asia), and category buyer interviews. Not proprietary sales data.

analogs.outcome: Strong sell-through (est. 75-80%) by April. Markdown minimal. Restocked twice in season.
analogs.what_worked: Strong creator coverage (mid-tier Indian influencers). Myntra new arrivals section drove early traffic. Affordable and occasion-versatile.
analogs.what_didnt: Over-ordered in XL+ sizes. Premium embroidered variants sat.
analogs.notes: This category reliably performs in Spring/Summer for Tier 1-2 urban buyers.

analogs.outcome: Moderate sell-through (55-65%). Slower on stripes. Solid ecru/beige performed well.
analogs.what_worked: Heat-appropriate fabric drove genuine repeat purchases. Google Trends showed sustained 'linen co-ord' search interest through June.
analogs.what_didnt: Stripe variant underperformed in Tier-2 cities. Positioned slightly high for pure value shoppers.
analogs.notes: Linen performs best May-July. Miss this window and it sits.

analogs.silhouette: Crop top + flared skirt or palazzo
analogs.outcome: High sell-through in Nov but narrow window. Markdowns began December.
analogs.what_worked: Festive occasion demand is predictable. Zudio and Max both stocked early.
analogs.what_didnt: Window is 6 weeks (Navratri → Diwali → post-Diwali crash). Late entrants got stuck.
analogs.notes: Timing is everything. Deep buy only if you can land inventory by late September.

analogs.silhouette: Crop top + fitted flare or shorts
analogs.outcome: Weak in value retail. Strong on Myntra premium. Did not travel to Tier-2.
analogs.what_worked: Instagram creator traffic was significant. Looked good in Reels.
analogs.what_didnt: Comfort/fit not suited to Indian body proportions in tight knit. Returns were high. Value-fashion buyer was not the primary buyer.
analogs.notes: Classic example of creator buzz not converting. Social signal was misleading.

analogs.trend: Ethnic Fusion Co-ord Sets (kurta + pallazo in Ajrakh / Bagru print)
analogs.outcome: Steady sell-through (65-70%). Less trend-dependent, more category staple.
analogs.what_worked: Occasion-versatile (casual + semi-formal). Festival crossover. Buyers in Rajasthan / Gujarat over-indexed.
analogs.what_didnt: Slow in South India. Metro buyers preferred western silhouettes.
analogs.notes: Safe bet for moderate buy. Strong in regional clusters.

analogs.outcome: Failed at value retail. Returned heavily. Did not convert from social.
analogs.what_worked: High creator engagement. Trended on Pinterest.
analogs.what_didnt: Modesty mismatch for core value-fashion buyer. Sizing complications. Returned rate >30%.
analogs.notes: Classic global trend that does not translate. Creator signal was very high but buyer profile mismatch.

analogs.trend: Earthy / Utility Cotton Co-ord Sets (cargo / utility pocket)
analogs.silhouette: Relaxed shirt / short kurta + wide cargo trouser
analogs.print: Solid (earth tones: camel, khaki, rust, olive)
analogs.outcome: Strong sell-through (est. 78%). Camel and olive led. Restocked in April.
analogs.what_worked: Multiple signal alignment: creator buzz + Myntra new arrivals + Zudio early stock. Earth tones are occasion-flexible. Comfort-forward.
analogs.what_didnt: Rust and khaki slower in South India market.
analogs.notes: Most closely analogous to current 'Earthy Tone Utility Co-ords' trend. Strong precedent.

analogs.outcome: Weak sell-through (40-45%). Heavy markdowns by July.
analogs.what_didnt: India entry was 18 months behind the global peak. Competitors flooded the market simultaneously.
analogs.notes: Cautionary example of buying a global trend too late.

analogs.outcome: Moderate (60%). Stronger in Tier-1 cities and travel/resort contexts.
analogs.what_worked: Instagram engagement high. Myntra category curation featured it.
analogs.what_didnt: Print fatigue by June. Tier-2 preferred solid or ethnic options.
analogs.notes: Works as a small trial. Print-led trends have shorter windows.

analogs.trend: Pastel Solid Co-ord Sets (lavender / sage / blush)
analogs.silhouette: Flared top + straight or flared trouser
analogs.outcome: Good (68-72%). Occasion-versatile, especially for brunches and casual outings.
analogs.what_worked: Pastel is perennially India-relevant for spring. Creator haul content peaked Feb-March.
analogs.what_didnt: Needed strong visual merchandising — poor photography killed conversions.
analogs.notes: Reliable spring performer. Less risky than print-led trends.
